title: Norwegian-Style Grilled Beans
description: A comforting and hearty dish inspired by Norwegian cuisine, featuring grilled beans in a smoky and savory sauce.
instructions: Trim the ends of the runner beans and cut into 1-inch pieces.
In a large bowl, whisk together fermented bean paste, olive oil, salt, black pepper, and garlic.
Add the runner beans to the bowl and toss to coat with the sauce.
Thread the bean pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the beans are tender and slightly charred.
Brush the grill seasoning onto the beans during the last minute of grilling.
Remove the skewers from the grill and serve hot.
